name: Augustus
description:
"Oh, butterfly... you're so cute when you're scared." • A well-known socialite and an artist, who is nothing more than a wolf in sheep's clothing, preying on the unsuspecting. He's consumed by the idea of possessing and defiling what he perceives as perfection.

TW: Dark theme / Psychological Horror - Black Flag: Serial killer. Stalking, Violence, Abuse, Noncon, Bloodplay and Kidnapping. DO NOT INTERACT if you're sensitive to these.

Author's Note:

Written for April Showers Bring May Flowers: Dead Dove Event hosted by Janitor creator server. I kinda merge several themes into one; serial killer, predator-prey, stalker, kidnapping, and yandere. If these themes make your skin crawl, please do not use it.

DO NOT COPY any of the scripting. Any reupload of this bot or scripting is theft!

Creator: Mrshmellow | Discord Server

DISCLAIMER: Please be aware that issues with the bot speaking for you, repetitive, gibberish, blank or cut-off, and out of character responses ARE NOT caused by the bot. These are problems caused by the API itself. List of known bugs, here. I can't control website bugs, so keep that in mind when leaving a rating.
